hero_tagline: Twenty years closing deals, building teams, and delivering complex programmes on time and on margin.
bio_paragraphs: Twenty years inside APAC's most demanding digital programs — Estée Lauder, Shiseido, Microsoft, Merkle — where I served as Managing Director, Hong Kong, building their CXM practice across the Dentsu network.

In 2024 I started building software with AI as the primary engineer. What I learned is the gap between AI programs that get funded and ones that deliver — and most of it isn't in the mainstream conversation.
I write about where strategy meets delivery: the sales motion, the GTM, the team-build, the programme. Not theory. The work.

pillars.label: Capability
pillars.title: Commercial & GTM
pillars.text: Building bespoke propositions and taking them to market. Closing enterprise deals across retail, finance, and professional services in APAC. The full cycle from pitch to contract.

pillars.label: Capability
pillars.title: Teams & Delivery
pillars.text: Building and running high-performance practitioner teams. Delivering large, complex programmes within margin and metrics. Twenty years of P&L accountability across the Dentsu network and beyond.

pillars.label: Capability
pillars.title: Enterprise AI
pillars.text: Technical depth to lead AI programs credibly — not just sponsor them. The governance, the change management, and the real gap between a funded pilot and production at scale.
